---
name: 'refactoring'
description: 'Improves code structure without changing behavior'
---

<!-- PromptScript 2026-03-04T16:49:01.160Z - do not edit -->

## Golden Rule

Change behavior OR change structure, never both at once.

## Workflow

1. Ensure tests exist
2. Make small changes
3. Run tests frequently
4. Commit often

## Common Refactorings

- Extract function
- Replace conditionals with polymorphism
- Simplify conditionals
- Remove duplication
